narrative_beat: Mão segurando o livro 1984 de Orwell sendo rasgado ao meio, revelando luz dourada e texto bíblico ardendo dentro — fundo câmeras vigilância e olho do Grande Irmão

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic, crimson and gold tones, book being torn revealing inner divine light, oppressive background, 35mm grain, halation, prophetic horror

shot.camera_angle: 45 degrees above, looking down at hands holding book
shot.depth_of_field: book and hands sharp, background blurred

subject.primary: two hands tearing apart a vintage 1940s hardcover book labeled '1984', ripped open at the spine, revealing blinding golden divine light and glowing text erupting from the torn pages
subject.focal_point: the torn opening of the book radiating golden light — the moment of revelation
subject.secondary: thin pale fingers with urgency, torn pages flying, ash embers rising from the golden light within
props: vintage hardcover book '1984' spine cracking apart
golden divine light erupting from inside torn book
floating torn paper fragments and ash embers

environment.location: dark oppressive space, background filled with blurred surveillance cameras, massive blurred Big Brother eye poster in deep background
environment.time_of_day: complete darkness except for the divine golden light from the book
environment.atmosphere: apocalyptic revelation — the book contains the prophecy

composition.rule: centered composition — book and golden light as focal center
composition.foreground: hands holding torn book in center-left of frame, golden light erupting rightward
composition.midground: flying torn pages and ash embers filling mid-frame in amber tones
composition.background: deep dark: blurred Big Brother eye and surveillance cameras in black-and-white — right edge of frame kept dark for text overlay
composition.safe_zone_for_overlay: right 35% of frame and bottom strip — kept dark for title text

lighting.key_light: golden divine light erupting from inside the torn book — primary light source of entire scene
lighting.fill_light: none — total darkness surrounding the book
lighting.rim_light: amber-gold rim on fingers holding book, crimson edge glow from background
lighting.mood: revelation erupting from within — prophecy breaking free
lighting.shadow_quality: near-total darkness surrounding golden core — maximum contrast

style.post_processing: extreme contrast — near-black background vs. blinding golden center, halation on book light, crimson vignette, 35mm grain, glowing edges on torn pages
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, paper texture, ash embers, dust particles floating in divine light

mood.emotion: revelation, discovery, shock — the truth was always inside
mood.tension: high — the moment of tearing open the lie

symbolism.primary: 1984 the book torn open revealing the biblical prophecy within — Orwell unknowingly channeled Daniel
symbolism.secondary: Big Brother eye in background being blinded by the divine light

negative_as_positive: photorealistic — not illustration, not CGI-looking, not video game aesthetic
golden light MUST be genuine bright warm divine glow — not blue or white
hands MUST look real and human — thin, urgent
background MUST be dark and desaturated — book light is only color source
no text or logos embedded in image
right third and bottom strip must remain dark for post-production text overlay

in_scene_text.note: DANIEL PREVIU / 1984 text overlay will be added post-production on right third

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer atmosphere, grain, crimson-amber palette only. Scene lighting comes from divine golden book light.
